title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Quikr

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Quikr
jsonLd.description:
Join the Quikr family as a Software Engineer in Bhopal. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Quikr:
Quikr is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Quikr!
